LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THIET NGUYEN, CHANH NGUYEN, MONG O'STEEN, U.S. MILK NUTRITION, INC. AND AMERICAN NUTRITION MILK, INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION. THE CAUSE IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED. THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. COURT FINDS VENUE DOES NOT PROPERLY LIE IN SAN FRANCISCO. THIS ACTION IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PAY TRANSFER FEES. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES F. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ruben P. Ruiz of the law offices of Ruben P. Ruiz, PC (866-448-4989) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Jonathan Ryan Tung of the law offices of Jonathan Ryan Tung (408-359-7311) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFS TRANG PHAM, NHUAN TO, HANG PHAM and THI NGUYEN'S Application For Right To Attach is taken OFF CALENDAR in light of the ruling on the motion to transfer venue.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ruben P. Ruiz of the law offices of Ruben P. Ruiz, PC (866-448-4989) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Jonathan Ryan Tung of the law offices of Jonathan Ryan Tung (408-359-7311) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS THIET NGUYEN, CHANH NGUYEN, MONG O'STEEN, U.S. MILK NUTRITION, INC. and AMERICAN NUTRITION MILK, INC.'S Motion To Transfer Action is GRANTED. Court finds venue does not properly lie in San Francisco. This action is ordered transferred to Riverside County Superior Court. Counsel for plaintiff to pay transfer fees. Request for sanctions is DENIED. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Continued To Nov-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Ryan Tung, Esq. (408-359-7311) for Plaintiff.
Darryl Sheetz, Esq. (949-553-0300 ext 1) for Defendant through Court Call.

RULING - ARGUED. Plaintiff argues proof of service was filed. Defendant argues parties were not served properly and there is a motion to change venue that is pending.
